# items

**Instance Property**

The items that are part of the collection.

## Declaration

```swift
var items: [ASImportableLinkedItem]
```

## Accessing collection properties

- **id**: A unique identifier for the collection.
- **title**: The title of the collection.
- **subtitle**: The subtitle of the collection, if any.
- **ASImportableLinkedItem**: A linked item for use in import and export.
- **subcollections**: Subcollections that are part of the collection.
